title: Fix: bundle passes runId to artifact summary endpoint
description: Walkthrough of the two-file fix that enables hlx tickets bundle to produce populated archives for PREVIEW_READY and other non-active ticket statuses.

steps.title: Import getFlag alongside requireFlag
steps.description: Added getFlag to the import from flags.js. This utility reads an optional CLI flag value (returns string | undefined), matching the pattern used by artifact.ts and artifacts.ts.

steps.title: Parse the --run flag
steps.description: Added explicitRunId = getFlag(args, '--run') to read an optional explicit run ID from the CLI arguments. This is parsed after --out (required) and before the ticket detail fetch.

steps.title: Prefer explicit run ID in resolution chain
steps.description: Changed the runId resolution from 'ticket.currentRun?.id ?? ticket.runs[0]?.id' to 'explicitRunId ?? ticket.currentRun?.id ?? ticket.runs[0]?.id'. The --run flag value takes precedence over auto-resolution, matching artifact.ts:29-35.

steps.title: Core fix: pass runId to artifact summary endpoint
steps.description: This is the root cause fix. Added queryParams: { runId } to the hxFetch call for /tickets/${ticketId}/artifacts. Without this parameter, the server returns empty stepArtifactSummary for non-active statuses (PREVIEW_READY, DEPLOYED, etc.). The runId is always non-null here (guarded by the exit at lines 38-40).

steps.title: Update usage string
steps.description: Added [--run <runId>] to the bundle line in the main tickets usage output, matching the pattern used by artifacts (line 25) and artifact (line 26).

steps.title: Update help text
steps.description: Added [--run <runId>] to the bundle-specific help text shown when 'hlx tickets bundle --help' is invoked.
